meaning: n.家务总管,杂役,打杂的人,[印]特大型花体大写字母
examples: We need a factotum to take care of the workshop.
The old man who was his indoor factotum came at the same moment to the foot of the stairs.
The old man who was his indoor factotum came at the same moment to the foot of the stairs .
All that seems to have been behind the chancellor's decision to praise away his factotum to higher things abroad.
